star_1.text: Stopped working properly. I really enjoyed this game. Lots of missions and goals. Cute pets. Tons of mini games. Then randomly the task was to "buy 10 gift boxes". I've bought over 20, but the mission will not mark complete. Without the mission marking complete I can't get any new missions. What fun is it to have a goal that you've completed multiple times not registered? It's not fun. It's frustrating. I've tried sending an email. I've tried deleting the game and reinstalling. Nothing.

The scenery stays the same throughout the whole entire game but not just this one, all your games have the exact same backgrounds as each other and don't change as you progress further on. Woods and buildings that's it. The only thing that changes is the pets you can purchase or if you download the one where you travel on water.. So as you can imagine it gets really boring rather quickly. And seems pointless having them all because of this.

Love the game, but the offering on Play Pass is misleading, very frustrating. Supposed to be no in-app purchases, which means all the available in-app purchases are supposed to be free. However, it doesn't allow us to get to the screen to make any of those "free purchases". Gets worse w/ each update, lose all purchased pets & now all my power ups. We're actually at more of a disadvantage than those who can purchase. Developer responded acknowledging they did indeed hide consumable purchases.

Falsely claims to have no ads before download. what's in the first 3 seconds of being on the actual game there were ads. I don't like false advertisement. after I download the game now all of a sudden it says ads. they manipulate so they don't have to get sued by lying to you when you first go to download it, below to download the text reads no ads and then after you download it only admits that it has ads. So the goal is to gaslight people so you don't have to take accountability. Got it.

Ads with playpass! I don't understand how they are doing this but there are many places in the game to unlock a box or upgrade where you still have to watch an ad! The whole reason we use playpass is so we can avoid that. Disappointing. Would be a great game otherwise.

star_4.text: It's been a long time since I played this but the new update is nice. I like the new features like new pets, homes, feeding etc but when you buy more pets, over time, their food/play levels go down and they do as well after you run, even those for pets you haven't used. In my opinion it should only go down after you take your pet for a run and no other pets bars are lowered at the same time because it gets to be too high maintenance to feed and play all pets simultaneously.

star_5.text: This is very fun and entertaining game, although, it can be very overwhelming for others. It is very enjoyable due to the fact that there are many things to do in the game, like playing with the dog, and even taking care of it. Also.. I really enjoy the Gold Mine part. It's quite creative and is unique. But the only problem I have with it is how many things are going on at the same time, like where your player goes onto a cart. Love the game, plus the ads are minimal!

I Absolutely Love It 😍😍 I get to play with the puppy 😊 feed the puppy and everything 😁😁 it's just as much fun as having an actual puppy and the tricks that he does when collecting coins 😂😂 it's Absolutely Amazing 🤩🤩 🤩

Very fun, just confused why there is a score. I love playing your games. I just had a question about Pet Run. I started it recently and have looked all over for an answer. What exactly is the point of the score points? There are multipliers galore, but what does having that score do? Coins and gems get upgrades and boosts. Upgrades unlock pets and score multipliers. I am just confused why there is a score. Lol. Thanks!

This app is so cute! I didn't expect to love it as much as I do but it's relaxing to me. I love the options of animals and that you can take care of them and play mini games too. My favorite pets are the rabbit and sheep. If you ever make an albino rabbit to join the game I'd love to see it. 🐇💗 Thanks for a fun game!

This app is very fun and very easy to play. It features adorable puppies who run and avoid obstacles. The graphics are great and the gameplay is smooth. This is a great way to pass the time. I really liked this app and would recommend it to others.

For those talking about the annoying ads, I found the game can play offline (I tested it) so to keep those annoying ads from popping up while you're playing simply put the phone in airplane mode before opening the app. you're welcome

This is such a fun little game. I love the main dog, so sweet! I like it you can take care of the dog, and run and go on adventures. It's a really cool game. Quite simple to play, and great fun. You'll lose hours of time playing this fun game. There's some videos that pop up, and you can watch videos to get extra gems, and other things that go towards helping your pup. Very fun. If I could give more than 5 stars, I would. 🌟
